creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Test-builds fine on 11a, 10.2a+i, 9.3a.

The following ports depend on devel/py-pbr:

databases/py-swiftclient/Makefile
databases/py-swift/Makefile
devel/py-python-jenkins/Makefile

Hmm...
